faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.q1: Which platforms does CreaFix AI support?
items.a1: 9 monetizable platforms: YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), Snapchat, Twitch, Pinterest and LinkedIn. The first 5 are Live (full audit). Snapchat, Twitch and Pinterest are in beta. LinkedIn coming soon.
items.q2: Does CreaFix AI work for accounts with few followers?
items.a2: Yes. Even with 0 followers, CreaFix AI analyzes your content, niche and target audience to tell you exactly what to change to become eligible for YouTube monetization (YPP), Facebook In-Stream Ads, Instagram Reels Play, TikTok Creator Rewards, Twitch Affiliate, etc.
items.a3: 100%. We use official OAuth from each platform (Meta Graph, TikTok Display API, Google/YouTube Data API, X API, Snap Login Kit, Twitch API, Pinterest API, LinkedIn API). We never store your password. You can revoke access at any time.
items.q4: How much does a creator earn on each platform?
items.a4: RPMs vary massively: Twitch ≈ $3.50, YouTube ≈ $2.40, Instagram ≈ $1.40, X ≈ $1.20, Facebook ≈ $1.10, Snapchat ≈ $0.90, Pinterest ≈ $0.80, TikTok ≈ $0.60. Our RPM Predictor shows your exact estimated revenue by country, niche, watch time and audience quality within ±15%.
items.q5: Can I pay in USD or Mobile Money?
items.a5: Yes. We accept Stripe (cards), PayPal, Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo, Moov Money and Free Money. Prices in USD, EUR and local currencies.
items.q6: How does AI detect a shadowban?
items.a6: Our Shadowban Detector monitors 12 distinct signatures per platform: reach drop, engagement/follower ratio, FYP/Reels/Explore exclusion, silent removal, filtered hashtags. It compares your reach to your 30-day baseline and sends a WhatsApp + email alert in under 2 hours.
items.q7: Does it work for my agency?
items.a7: The Agency plan lets you manage unlimited clients across all 9 platforms, export white-label PDF reports, share private links and use your own branding. Perfect for multi-account social agencies.
items.a8: Yes — a Flutter app (Android + iOS) is in private beta with push notifications, video upload and real-time analysis on all 9 platforms. Available to Pro and Agency subscribers in early access.

cta.subtitle: Free AI audit in 60 seconds. No card. No commitment. The simplest way to turn your views into revenue.
